entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange and P2P marketplace providing spot markets, OTC trading, account-based exchange access, trading APIs, fee cashback, and peer-to-peer fiat trading services.
entity.notes: Current first-party BIT.TEAM website exposes live exchange and P2P surfaces, account creation and login, OTC services, trading API access, active market counts, KYC user counts, and current 24-hour volume. Country/origin remains Global because this review did not establish one stable operating jurisdiction from sufficiently strong public material.

evidence.title: BIT.TEAM official cryptocurrency exchange
evidence.notes: Current first-party site exposes active exchange markets, account access, KYC user and market statistics, OTC trading, API access, cashback, and support services.

evidence.title: BIT.TEAM P2P marketplace
evidence.notes: First-party P2P product surface corroborates the exchange's peer-to-peer fiat trading service alongside the centralized market venue.

evidence.title: BIT.TEAM exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus independently identifies BIT.TEAM as an exchange venue; current first-party service surfaces support active classification.
